title: Fault Bus
story: [Meridian-7 Log #026 — Final Repair Window] The alien core is online, but the ship still cannot launch. A binary maintenance bus is streaming fault frames from the hybrid engine. You must identify only the fault frames that are both structurally valid and mapped to the correct repair operation. Stabilize all valid repairs, and Meridian-7 can finally go home.
promptChallenge: [Target] Match all repair-ready fault frames in this pure hex dump. Frame format: 19 ?? 00 00 01 FC1 FC2 OP1 OP2 .... .. .. .. .. .. 7E. Fault map: F1 0A -> A0 11, F2 1C -> B4 02, E9 7D -> C8 3F. Reject frames with wrong header, wrong marker, wrong operation mapping, unknown fault code, or wrong trailer.
input: 000000F0  FA CE F1 0A A0 11 F2 1C B4 02 E9 7D C8 3F FA CE
hints: [Hint] Start anchor: frame byte 0 must be 19. Marker bytes 2-4 must be 00 00 01.
[Hint] Fault and operation are linked. Use the exact mapping table, not just any known operation bytes.
[Hint] End anchor: byte 15 must be 7E. Several near-miss frames fail only one rule.
[Hint] The data stream is multi-line. Your regex needs the gm flags: m makes ^/$ match each line boundary, g finds all valid frames.
promptHints: Ask the AI to match raw hex bytes only, with strict positional constraints on key byte groups.
Tell the AI to support both regex styles: address+data lines and data-only bytes.
Require joint validation: header + marker + fault/repair mapping + trailer.

feedback.onPass: [REPAIR WINDOW STABLE] Valid maintenance frames accepted. Core vibration is dropping and launch prep can continue.
feedback.onFail: [Repair Incomplete] Noise or counterfeit maintenance frames still pass through. Tighten your frame constraints.
feedback.onPerfect: [PERFECT REPAIR CHAIN] Every valid fault frame was mapped to the correct operation. Meridian-7 engine lock is green.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Repair Path] You bypassed prompt optimization but still restored the maintenance bus. Core is mission-ready.

profiles.label: Hex data only
profiles.description: Take only the data column [10,57), match against the whole merged dump, and normalize whitespace before comparing.

profiles.label: Address + hex data
profiles.description: Take the address+data region [0,57), allow address-aware regexes, strip addresses from matches, and normalize whitespace.
